      "それは取り付け時に両端に頭があります。",
      "それは滑らかな円筒形の軸を持っています。",
      "それは片端に頭があります。",
      "それは頭と反対側の端に尾があります。",
      "それはショップヘッドまたはバックテールと呼ばれる変形した端があります。",
      "それは半管状タイプで先端に部分的な穴があります。",
      "それはブラインドタイプで中心に針のようなマンドレルがあります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは恒久的な機械的ファスナーであることが特徴です。",
      "それは引張荷重を支えることが特徴です。",
      "それは引張荷重よりもせん断荷重を支える能力が高いことが特徴です。",
      "それは青銅器時代にさかのぼる考古学的発見で発見されていることが特徴です。",
      "それはナカダ文化（紀元前4400年から紀元前3000年）にさかのぼるエジプトの槍先で見つかっていることが特徴です。",
      "それは事前にドリルされた穴に打ち込まれ、反対側で変形させて固定することが特徴です。",
      "それは構造用鋼の建設において高強度ボルトに大部分置き換えられていることが特徴です。",
      "それは構造用鋼のリベットを取り付けるために熟練した労働者を必要とすることが特徴です。",
      "それは手動、空気圧ハンマー、ハンドヘルドスクイーザー、リベット機械などの複数の設置方法があることが特徴です。",
      "それはリベットガンとバッキングバーを使用してバックされることが特徴です。"

      "それは最も古く、最も信頼性の高いファスナーのタイプの一つです。",
      "それはその歴史的な形態では金属の短い棒です。",
      "それはブラインドタイプではマンドレルが針のような管状ファスナーです。",
      "それは先端に部分的な穴がある半管状ファスナーです。"
    ],
    "KnownAs": [
      "それはブラインドタイプではポップリベットとして知られています。"

      "それは橋、クレーン、建物のフレームなどの静的構造での使用で知られています。",
      "それは照明、ブレーキ、はしご、バインダー、HVACダクト、機械製品、電子機器での使用で知られています。",

About: It is about a permanent mechanical fastener.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with traditional wooden boat building.
BelongsTo: It belongs to permanent mechanical fasteners.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a smooth cylindrical shaft with a head on one end before installation.
It consists of a tail on the end opposite the head.
It consists of a deformed end called the shop head or buck-tail after installation.
HasA: It has a head on each end when installed.
It has a smooth cylindrical shaft.
It has a head on one end.
It has a tail on the end opposite the head.
It has a deformed end called the shop head or buck-tail.
It has a partial hole at the tip in the semi-tubular type.
It has a nail-like mandrel through the center in the blind type.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being a permanent mechanical fastener.
It is characterized by supporting tension loads.
It is characterized by being more capable of supporting shear loads than tension loads.
It is characterized by having been found in archaeological findings dating back to the Bronze Age.
It is characterized by having rivet holes found in Egyptian spearheads dating back to the Naqada culture.
It is characterized by being hammered into a pre-drilled hole and deformed on the other side to hold them in place.
It is characterized by being largely replaced by high-strength bolts in structural steel construction.
It is characterized by requiring skilled workers for installation in structural steel applications.
It is characterized by several installation methods including manual, pneumatic hammers, handheld squeezers, and riveting machines.
It is characterized by being bucked using a rivet gun and bucking bar.
IsA: It is a permanent mechanical fastener.
It is one of the oldest and most reliable types of fasteners.
It is a solid rod of metal in its historical form.
It is a tubular fastener with a nail-like mandrel in the blind type.
It is a semi-tubular fastener with a partial hole at the tip.
KnownAs: It is known as a pop rivet in its blind type.
KnownFor: It is known for being a permanent mechanical fastener.
It is known for supporting shear loads.
It is known for its historical use dating back to the Bronze Age.
It is known for its use in structural parts of aircraft.
It is known for its use in static structures such as bridges, cranes, and building frames.
It is known for its use in lighting, brakes, ladders, binders, HVAC duct-work, mechanical products, and electronics.
It is known for its use in the construction of modern reproduction of medieval armour, jewellery and metal couture.
It is known for requiring skilled workers for installation in structural steel applications.
It is known for being largely replaced by high-strength bolts in structural steel construction.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Bronze Age.
It occurred in the Naqada culture.
It occurred in Bronze Age swords and daggers.
It occurred in structural steel construction.
It occurred in the construction of RMS Titanic.
PerformedBy: It was performed by metalworkers.
It was performed by installers.
It was performed by a rivet gun.
It was performed by a bucking bar.
It was performed by a ball-peen hammer.
It was performed by a rivet warmer.
It was performed by a catcher.
It was performed by a holder up.
It was performed by a riveter.
It was performed by a basher.
UsedAs: It is used as a permanent mechanical fastener.
It is used as a rivet gun.
It is used as a bucking bar.
It is used as a ball-peen hammer.
It is used as a rivet warmer.
It is used as a catcher.
It is used as a holder up.
It is used as a riveter.
It is used as a basher.
UsedFor: It is used for supporting tension loads.
It is used for supporting shear loads.
It is used for assembling the frame of a modern aircraft.
It is used for pivot points where movement is desired.
It is used for joining parts.
It is used for locking sheets.
UsedIn: It is used in static structures such as bridges, cranes, and building frames.
It is used in lighting, brakes, ladders, binders, HVAC duct-work, mechanical products, and electronics.
It is used in the construction of modern reproduction of medieval armour, jewellery and metal couture.
It is used in traditional wooden boat building.
It is used in Egyptian spearheads.
It is used in Bronze Age swords and daggers.
It is used in structural steel construction.
It is used in the structural parts of aircraft.
It is used in static structures such as bridges, cranes, and building frames.
It is used in lighting, brakes, ladders, binders, HVAC duct-work, mechanical products, and electronics.
It is used in the construction of modern reproduction of medieval armour, jewellery and metal couture.
It is used in the building of the Siskin III aircraft.
UsedTo: It is used to hold them in place.
It is used to reduce the amount of force needed for application.
It is used to lock the sheets being fastened.
It is used to compress the fastened sheets.
It is used to soften by solution treating.
It is used to slow the age-hardening process.
It is used to deform the tail of the rivet.
It is used to upset the tail of the rivet.
It is used to roll an edge so that it is flush against the material.
It is used to exert clamping force on the joint.

HasFeatureOf: それは恒久的な機械的ファスナーであることが特徴です。
それは引張荷重を支えることが特徴です。
それは引張荷重よりもせん断荷重を支える能力が高いことが特徴です。
それは青銅器時代にさかのぼる考古学的発見で発見されていることが特徴です。
それはナカダ文化（紀元前4400年から紀元前3000年）にさかのぼるエジプトの槍先で見つかっていることが特徴です。
それは事前にドリルされた穴に打ち込まれ、反対側で変形させて固定することが特徴です。
それは構造用鋼の建設において高強度ボルトに大部分置き換えられていることが特徴です。
それは構造用鋼のリベットを取り付けるために熟練した労働者を必要とすることが特徴です。
それは手動、空気圧ハンマー、ハンドヘルドスクイーザー、リベット機械などの複数の設置方法があることが特徴です。
それはリベットガンとバッキングバーを使用してバックされることが特徴です。
IsA: それは恒久的な機械的ファスナーです。
それは最も古く、最も信頼性の高いファスナーのタイプの一つです。
それはその歴史的な形態では金属の短い棒です。
それはブラインドタイプではマンドレルが針のような管状ファスナーです。
それは先端に部分的な穴がある半管状ファスナーです。
KnownAs: それはブラインドタイプではポップリベットとして知られています。
KnownFor: それは恒久的な機械的ファスナーであることが知られています。

それは航空機の構造部分での使用で知られています。
それは橋、クレーン、建物のフレームなどの静的構造での使用で知られています。
それは照明、ブレーキ、はしご、バインダー、HVACダクト、機械製品、電子機器での使用で知られています。
それは中世の鎧、宝飾品、メタルクチュールの現代的な再現の建設での使用で知られています。
それは構造用鋼の設置に熟練した労働者を必要とすることが知られています。
それは構造用鋼の建設において高強度ボルトに大部分置き換えられていることが知られています。
